holdings.infoBox: JETS is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Southwest Airlines Co. stock at 10.64%, United Airlines Holdings at 10.63%, American Airlines Group at 10.60%, Delta Air Lines at 10.52%, and Allegiant Travel Company at 3.75%.

overview.description: The U.S. Global Jets ETF (JETS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Stuttgart US Global Jets index. The fund invests in both US and non-US airline companies. This concentrated portfolio is weighted towards domestic passenger airlines. JETS was launched on Apr 28, 2015 and is issued by US Global Investors.
